name: SciCo-Skills
description: A collection of Claude Code skills for scientific research and publication. scientific-data-viz — publication-quality, code-rendered journal figures from real data (20 palettes, statistics incl. PERMANOVA). amplicon-analysis — 16S/ITS microbiome pipeline (FASTQ via DADA2 or feature table): alpha & beta diversity (PCoA, PERMANOVA) and differential abundance. shotgun-analysis — shotgun metagenomics: QC + host removal, read-based profiling (MetaPhlAn/Kraken2, HUMAnN) or assembly-based MAGs (MEGAHIT, MetaBAT2/CONCOCT/SemiBin2 + DAS_Tool, CheckM2, GTDB-Tk), then diversity and differential abundance. genome-analysis — bacterial isolate genome backbone: QC, assembly (SPAdes/Unicycler/Shovill/SKESA/Flye/Canu/Raven), assembly QC (QUAST, CheckM2), annotation (Bakta/Prokka), species ID (GTDB-Tk/ANI). strain-typing — MLST, serotyping (SISTR/ECTyper), cgMLST (chewBBACA). amr-profiling — AMR genes, virulence, and plasmids via AMRFinderPlus + abricate. scientific-workflow-viz — BioRender-style concept-figure image prompts with optional Google Nano Banana (Gemini) rendering.
